impact: Built end-to-end ML pipeline that reduced prediction latency by 40%

impact: Delivered 6+ client projects across edtech, healthtech, and consumer apps

impact: Authored comprehensive research on LLM multilingual deficit and tokenization inequality
description: Investigated the structural inequality in Large Language Models for non-English scripts. Traced cascading architectural failures from byte-level BPE tokenization through attention mechanisms. Demonstrated how a Kannada sentence requires 3-5x more tokens, escalating computational costs and degrading context window utility. Evaluated cutting-edge solutions including vocabulary expansion and sovereign MOE architectures like AI4Bharat's IndicTrans2.
